landing.title: Manage your
landing.subtitle: Connect with relevant startups in one flow.
landing.rfxAgentDesc: Define, send and manage your RFXs
landing.intentLabel: Hi {{name}}, I am Qanvit. What is your next challenge?
intentLabelVariants: Hi {{name}}, I am Qanvit. What is your next challenge?
Hi {{name}}, which open innovation challenge do you want to launch today?
{{name}}, tell me the challenge you want to structure and I will help shape it.
Hi {{name}}, what opportunity do you want to open to startups this week?
{{name}}, which challenge do you want to solve with the right startups?
Hi {{name}}, share your goal and I will prepare the first draft of your project.
{{name}}, what business problem do you want to solve through open innovation?
Hi {{name}}, what business need do you want to turn into a challenge?
{{name}}, ready to launch your next challenge with Qanvit?
Hi {{name}}, where should we start with your next innovation challenge?

Tell me your next challenge and I will help you structure it.

rfxs.title: RFX Projects
rfxs.subtitle: Manage your sourcing requests from draft to completion. Create your RFX from 0, discover and connect with best suited suppliers and launch it in minutes. Receive proposals and analyze them with the RFX AI Agent.
rfxs.createNewWorkspaceDesc: Group your RFXs by client or project. The name must be unique for you (case-insensitive).
rfxs.assignRfxToWorkspaceDesc: Choose a workspace to group this RFX under, or leave it unassigned.
rfxs.searchPlaceholder: Search RFXs by name or description...
rfxs.removedFromRfx: You have been removed from this RFX
rfxs.failedToRemoveSelf: Failed to remove yourself from the RFX
rfxs.onlyCreatorCanArchive: Only the RFX creator can archive it
rfxs.cannotArchiveUnderReview: RFX cannot be archived while under review by Qanvit
rfxs.failedPostAndArchive: Failed to post announcement and archive RFX
rfxs.failedPostAndUnarchive: Failed to post announcement and unarchive RFX
rfxs.cannotDeleteSentRfx: Cannot delete an RFX that has been sent to suppliers
rfxs.createFirstToGetStarted: Create your first RFX project to get started
rfxs.signUpToCreateFirst: Sign up for free to create your first RFX project and start discovering suppliers
rfxs.confidentialityBlurb: QANVIT CONFIDENTIALITY COMMITMENT: Qanvit is committed to protecting users' confidential information and using it solely to provide its discovery and RFX management services.
rfxs.createNewRfxDesc: Create a new Request for X project
rfxs.limitReachedDesc: You are currently on the Free plan and already have one RFX created. Free users can only create one RFX. To create more, please upgrade your plan.
rfxs.paidPlanRequiredDesc: You need to be associated with a paid subscription seat to accept this collaborator invitation. Upgrade your plan to accept invitations and collaborate on RFX projects.
rfxs.deleteRfxConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this RFX? This action cannot be undone.
rfxs.cannotDeleteRfxDesc: You are not the owner of this RFX, so you cannot delete it. However, you can remove yourself from this RFX if you no longer wish to be a member.
rfxs.unarchiveConfirm: Are you sure you want to unarchive this RFX? Once unarchived, you will be able to modify the RFX and invited suppliers will be able to upload their documents again.
rfxs.archiveConfirm: Are you sure you want to archive this RFX? While archived:
rfxs.archiveConfirmBullet1: You will not be able to modify the RFX
rfxs.archiveConfirmBullet2: Invited suppliers will not be able to upload documents
rfxs.archiveConfirmUnarchiveLater: You can unarchive it later if needed.
rfxs.archiveNotifyDesc: This RFX has been sent to suppliers. You must post an announcement to notify them that the RFX is being archived and they will no longer be able to upload documents.
rfxs.archiveImportant: Important: Once archived, invited suppliers will not be able to upload documents. You can unarchive it later if needed.
rfxs.announcementMessagePlaceholder: Explain to suppliers why the RFX is being archived and what they should do next...
rfxs.unarchiveNotifyDesc: This RFX has been sent to suppliers. You must post an announcement to notify them that the RFX is being unarchived and they will be able to upload documents again.
rfxs.unarchiveImportant: Important: Once unarchived, invited suppliers will be able to upload documents again. The RFX will be fully functional.
rfxs.unarchiveMessagePlaceholder: Explain to suppliers that the RFX has been unarchived and they can now upload their documents...
rfxs.confidentialityInfoDesc: In case you want to read this document in the future, it is always available in the footer at the bottom of the page.
rfxs.loginPromptFree: Start with your first RFX for free!
rfxs.loginPromptSignUp: Sign up now to create your first RFX and discover suppliers. You can upgrade later for additional projects and paid seats.
rfxs.benefit1: Create your first RFX project for free
rfxs.alreadyHaveAccount: Already have an account? Log in
rfxs.progress_specs_tooltip: The RFX specifications have been defined, including description, technical requirements, and company requirements.
rfxs.progress_candidates_tooltip: Supplier candidates have been selected and evaluated for the RFX.
rfxs.progress_review_tooltip: The RFX has been sent to Qanvit for review and validation before being sent to suppliers.
rfxs.progress_validation_tooltip: Qanvit has validated the RFX and it is ready to be sent to the selected suppliers.
rfxs.progress_proposals_tooltip: Suppliers have submitted their proposals in response to the RFX.
rfxs.progress_analysis_tooltip: Qanvit's AI will analyze the received proposals and provide recommendations to help make a final decision. This feature is under development.
rfxs.detail_toast_encryptionMissing: Cannot save securely: Encryption key missing
rfxs.detail_toast_useSaveButton: Changes were applied but not saved. Please use the Save button.
rfxs.detail_toast_proposalsAutoAcceptedDesc: All proposals have been automatically applied since the fields were empty.
rfxs.detail_toast_noChangesForField: No changes found for this field.
rfxs.detail_toast_changesHidden: Changes for {{field}} have been hidden. You can show them again if needed.
rfxs.detail_toast_noAccessToRfx: You do not have access to this RFX
rfxs.todo_specs_desc: Complete the project description, technical requirements, and company requirements
rfxs.todo_candidates_desc: Review and select potential suppliers for this RFX
rfxs.nextStep_specs_desc:
Define your project scope, technical requirements, and evaluation criteria.
This step sets the foundation for supplier selection and the entire sourcing workflow.

Outputs:
  • Complete RFX specifications and documentation.
  • Defined criteria for evaluation and scoring.
  • Ready to identify matching suppliers.
rfxs.nextStep_candidates_desc:
Search, review, and shortlist suppliers aligned with your RFX requirements.
Compare technical capabilities, reliability, and company profiles before moving to launch.

Outputs:
  • Verified and qualified supplier shortlist.
  • Comparison of technical and commercial fit.
  • Ready for validation and RFX launch.
rfxs.nextStep_completePreviousToUnlock: Complete the previous steps to unlock this action
rfxs.specs_editPromptTooltip: Edit the RFX assistant prompt (developers only)
rfxs.specs_promptEditor_rfxAssistantDescripti: System prompt and parameters for the sidebar conversational chat (/ws-rfx-agent).
rfxs.specs_promptEditor_proposeEditsDescripti: Prompt and parameters for the tool that generates edit suggestions on the specifications.
rfxs.specs_promptEditor_hint_defaultLanguage: Language code or name the tool should assume when the conversation does not specify it (e.g. 'en', 'es').
rfxs.specs_promptEditor_description: Edit the prompt and save a new version. Every version is kept in the history.
rfxs.specs_promptEditor_historyWarning: Loading a previous version reactivates the full configuration snapshot from that moment, not just this prompt.
rfxs.specs_promptEditor_commentRequiredDesc: Add a comment describing the changes before saving.
rfxs.specs_promptEditor_savedDesc: A new active version of the prompt has been created.
rfxs.specs_promptEditor_activatedDesc: The configuration from {{date}} is now active.
rfxs.specs_promptEditor_loadError: Could not load the prompt configuration.
rfxs.specs_completeFieldsToProceed: Complete the requirement fields to move forward
rfxs.specs_completePdfConfigDesc: Before generating the PDF, we recommend completing the following sections:
rfxs.specs_imagesSectionDesc: You haven't uploaded any images yet. Consider adding images to make your RFX more comprehensive.
rfxs.specs_pdfCustomizationDesc: You're using default PDF customization settings. Consider customizing colors and logos to match your brand.
rfxs.specs_unsavedChangesDesc: You have made changes that haven't been saved as a version. You can stay on this page, leave without creating a version (you can continue working on these changes later), or create a version now to store your changes.
rfxs.specs_rfxAlreadySentDesc: This RFX has already been sent. You can modify the specifications freely, but please note the following:
rfxs.specs_forSuppliersToReceive: For suppliers to receive the updates:
rfxs.specs_sentStep1: You must save a new version of the specifications
rfxs.specs_sentStep2: Then validate it with the entire team
rfxs.specs_sentStep3: Finally, send it to suppliers (in this case there will be no validation by FQ)
rfxs.specs_rfxArchivedDesc: This RFX has been archived by the project creator.
rfxs.specs_archivedBullet1: You cannot modify the RFX specifications
rfxs.specs_archivedBullet3: The RFX is read-only for all users
rfxs.specs_onlyCreatorUnarchive: Only the project creator can unarchive it from the RFX list.
rfxs.specs_projectDescriptionSub: Define the objectives and scope of your RFX
rfxs.specs_technicalSpecsSub: Detail all technical requirements and standards
rfxs.specs_companyRequirementsSub: Define the required qualifications and experience
rfxs.specs_descriptionPlaceholder: Describe the main objectives, project scope, and any important context that suppliers need to know...
rfxs.specs_technicalPlaceholder: Include all technical requirements such as:...
rfxs.specs_companyPlaceholder: Include all company requirements such as:...
rfxs.todoWarning_one: There is 1 TODO that requires your attention
rfxs.todoWarning_other: There are {{count}} TODOs that may require your attention
rfxs.specs_toast_encryptionMissing: Cannot save securely: Encryption key missing
rfxs.specs_toast_useSaveButton: Changes were applied but not saved. Please use the Save button.
rfxs.specs_toast_accessDenied: You do not have access to this RFX
rfxs.specs_toast_noChangesForField: No changes found for this field.
rfxs.specs_dragOrClick: Drag files here or click to select
rfxs.specs_maxFilesHint: Maximum {{max}} files • 15MB per file • Any format
rfxs.specs_projectTimelineSub: Define milestones with absolute or relative dates
rfxs.specs_pdfSub: Header colors, section colors, and logos
rfxs.candidates_editPromptTooltip: Edit the prompts used on this page (developers only)
rfxs.candidates_promptEditor_desc_chat: System prompt for the candidates sidebar assistant (answers questions about evaluation results).
rfxs.candidates_promptEditor_desc_rubric: System prompt used to generate the evaluation rubric from the RFX requirements.
rfxs.candidates_promptEditor_desc_technicalEv: Prompts that evaluate each product/candidate against the technical rubric.
rfxs.candidates_promptEditor_desc_enrichment: Prompts for the company enrichment agent (news, people, rounds, financials, stage classification).
rfxs.candidates_promptEditor_hint_enrichmentS: May contain the placeholders {candidate_summary} and {rubric}; if absent, the hardcoded template is used as a fallback.
rfxs.candidates_promptEditor_hint_enrichmentB: Sent as the first message to the agent when enrichment starts (no user input).
rfxs.candidates_promptEditor_hint_enrichmentF: Must contain {user_input}, which is replaced by the user's question in the follow-up chat.
rfxs.candidates_chooseWay: Choose your preferred way to start selecting candidates for this RFX.
rfxs.candidates_readOnlyExample: This is a read-only public example. Modifications are not allowed.
rfxs.candidates_archivedNoModify: Suppliers cannot be modified because the RFX is archived
rfxs.candidates_reviewNoModify: Suppliers cannot be modified during the RFX review process
rfxs.candidates_alreadySentNoRemove: The RFX has already been sent to this supplier, so it can no longer be removed from the RFX
rfxs.candidates_removeConfirm: Are you sure you want to remove {{name}}{{product}} from the selected candidates?
rfxs.candidates_revisionDesc: Candidates cannot be modified during the RFX review process. Please wait until the review is complete (this process usually takes just a few hours).
rfxs.candidates_archivedDesc: This RFX has been archived by the project creator.
rfxs.candidates_archivedBullet3: The RFX is read-only for all users
rfxs.candidates_onlyCreatorUnarchive: Only the project creator can unarchive it from the RFX list.

rfxs.candidates_toast_askAgentNotFound: Could not find the Ask Qanvit Agent button. Please click it manually.
rfxs.candidates_toast_selectNotFound: Could not find the Select Candidates button. Please click it manually.
rfxs.cand_reevaluateQuestion: Do you want to reevaluate options?
rfxs.cand_viewRubricTooltip: View the Evaluation Rubric created by the AI for this RFX

rfxs.cand_rubricSectionContextSubtitle: Objectives and scope of the rubric context
rfxs.cand_askAgentToAnalyze: Ask Qanvit Agent to analyze your RFX and surface curated options.
rfxs.cand_searchManualDesc: Search for specific companies or products in the Qanvit database and add them to your RFX candidates
rfxs.cand_searchPlaceholder: Search by company name or product name...
rfxs.cand_findAndAddDesc: Find and add specific companies or products directly from our curated database to your RFX candidates
rfxs.cand_toast_noWebsiteDesc: This candidate doesn't have a website URL
rfxs.cand_minPercentMatchTooltip: Selects only candidates with overall match greater than or equal to the entered percentage.

rfxs.cand_supplierInsightsDescription: People and latest news for this supplier without leaving the candidate list.
rfxs.cand_supplierInsightsNoData: Supplier data is not available for this candidate.
rfxs.cand_latestNewsEmpty: No news available for this supplier.
rfxs.reasoningModal_authRequiredDesc: Please sign in to view supplier details
rfxs.scopeModal_title: Where should Qanvit look for candidates?
rfxs.scopeModal_description: Choose a point and radius to search nearby candidates.
rfxs.scopeModal_globallyDesc: Best matches anywhere in the Qanvit database.
rfxs.scopeModal_nearLocationDesc: Choose a point and a radius — we'll prioritize suppliers within that area.
rfxs.scopeModal_clickMapHint: …or click on the map to set a point.
rfxs.chat_resumingResponseDesc: A response was being generated when the page reloaded. Please wait for it to complete or stop it.
rfxs.chat_quickPromptProject: Make an RFX for a project called...
rfxs.chat_readOnly: Conversation with the RFX Agent is read-only in public examples.
rfxs.chat_resetDialogDescription: This will clear the entire conversation history and memory with the RFX Assistant. You will start fresh with a new conversation. This action cannot be undone.
rfxs.chat_welcomeMessage: Hello! I'm your specialized RFX assistant for industrial computer vision systems. I'm here to help you create a complete and professional RFX for the "{{rfxName}}" project. Let's begin building the projects specs, tell me briefly what are the key details of the project.
rfxs.chat_promptMakeRfx: Make an RFX for a project called "{{name}}". Further details: {{description}}.
rfxs.chat_promptAutofill: Fill in all the buyer-related TODO fields with reasonable values based on the context.
rfxs.chat_promptGenerateNow: Generate the final RFX now. Use the your dedicated tool without asking more questions.
rfxs.chat_toast_noValidImagesDesc: Please select valid image files (JPEG, PNG, GIF, WebP).
rfxs.chat_toast_noValidDocumentsDesc: Please select valid documents (PDF, DOC, DOCX, etc.).
rfxs.chat_toast_noValidFilesDesc: Please drop valid images or documents
rfxs.chat_toast_encryptionKeyMissing: Encryption key not available. Please reload and try again.
rfxs.chat_toast_failedResetConversation: Failed to reset conversation. Please try again.
rfxs.chat_toast_failedDecryptImages: Failed to decrypt images for sending

responses.title: Responses · {{name}}
responses.notAnswered: This company hasn't submitted their answers yet.
responses.noQuestionnaire: No published questionnaire for this RFX.

drawer.title: Actions · {{name}}
drawer.subject: Subject
drawer.bodyPlaceholder: Press 'Generate with AI' to get a first draft.
drawer.bodyHint: The questionnaire link is inserted automatically when opening the email.
drawer.noEmails: No emails available for this company.
drawer.noPhones: No phone numbers available for this company.
drawer.missingKey: Could not retrieve the RFX key.
drawer.specificEmpty: No specific questions yet for this company.
drawer.specificHint: Specific questions generated from this company's rubric. Added on top of the common questionnaire.

template.rfxDesc: Override of the DD checklist specific to this RFX. If left empty, the profile's default checklist is used.
template.usingUserFallback: This RFX has no custom checklist yet; showing your profile default. Save to create an override.
template.usingDefault: You're editing Qanvit's default checklist. Save to create your personal template.
template.overrideCleared: Override removed. The RFX now uses the default checklist.

gate.title: DD items still pending
gate.description: This card has {{count}} required item(s) not yet validated. You can move forward, but they'll show up in the RFX readiness report.

timeline.addNoteRfx: Add a note to the RFX
timeline.placeholder: Write anything the team should remember about this card…
timeline.placeholderRfx: Write anything the team should remember about this challenge…
timeline.editHint: You'll be able to edit or delete your note during the next 24 h.
timeline.emptyCard: No events or notes yet on this card.
timeline.emptyRfx: No team notes on this RFX yet.
timeline.missingCardId: This card doesn't have an internal id yet. Take an action on it and try again.
timeline.deleteConfirm: Delete this note? This cannot be undone.

send.dialogDesc: DocuSign will email the signing request to the recipient. You can customize the subject and body; leave them empty to use the default text.
send.noTemplateWarning: There is no NDA template set up for this RFX or your account. Upload one from My Profile or from 'NDA Template' in the workflow header.
send.bodyPlaceholder: Short message to include with the NDA.

errors.noTemplate: No NDA template configured. Upload one before sending.
errors.configMissing: DocuSign credentials missing on the server. Contact the admin.
errors.generic: Could not send the NDA. Please try again in a moment.

template.userHelper: Upload the PDF you want to use as the default NDA for all your RFXs. Each RFX can override it if needed.
template.rfxDesc: Template specific to this RFX. If present, it overrides the default template from your profile.
template.rfxHelper: Upload a PDF to use only in this RFX. Leave empty to use the default template from your profile.

briefing.dialogDesc: Key points, suggested questions and risks grounded on the questionnaire, the AI evaluation and the RFX context.
briefing.emptyHelper: You haven't prepared this call yet. The AI will read the questionnaire response, the prior evaluation and your playbook to give you key points and concrete questions for the meeting.
briefing.disclaimer: AI-generated. Review before using — it's prep material, not a script.

summaryView.disclaimer: AI-generated from your notes. Use it as a starting point, not a conclusion.

shortlist.dialogDesc: Comparative summary of the startups you've talked to, with an AI verdict per startup to decide who moves to NDA.
shortlist.noCallsYet: No calls held with summarized notes yet. Close at least one call to generate the shortlist.

schedule.dialogDesc: Pick a date and, optionally, a meeting link and a short agenda. Moving the card between columns is manual.
schedule.agendaPlaceholder: What we want to cover in this call.

log.dialogDesc: Save the actual date and meeting notes. History stays available on the card.
log.notesPlaceholder: What was covered, commitments, next steps…

discard.dialogDesc: Pick a reason and, if you want, a short comment. If you move the card back to another column, the history is lost.
discard.commentPlaceholder: Brief context: what we want to remember next time.
discard.suggestionTooltip: The app suggests discarding this startup. Click to review the reason and confirm.

suggestionHints.incompatible: its sector is flagged as incompatible

column.questionnaireRequiredDesc: Generate the questionnaire to start contacting these startups.
column.rubricRequiredDesc: Define and publish the rubric before evaluating responses.

header.ndaTemplateTooltip: Configure the NDA template specific to this RFX (overrides the default template on your profile).
header.ddTemplateTooltip: Configure the Due Diligence checklist specific to this RFX (overrides the default checklist).
header.rfxTimelineTooltip: RFX journal: team notes and key events across all cards.
header.rfxTimelineDesc: Team notes and events in chronological order. Notes can be edited by their author for 24 h.
header.rubricNeedsQuestionnaire: Publish the questionnaire first to define the rubric.

toasts.addStartupDesc: Adding startups manually will be available in a future iteration.

questionnaire.publishedToastDesc: Company-specific questions are being generated in the background.
questionnaire.specificReadyToastDesc: You can contact the startups: each one will get its personalized questions.

rubric.emptyDesc: Generate an initial proposal with AI from the published questionnaire. You can edit it by hand or request changes with comments afterwards.
rubric.anchorPlaceholder: What answer would match this score…
rubric.aiAssistHint: Describe what you want to change and the AI will rewrite the rubric based on the current one.
rubric.commentsPlaceholder: E.g. give technical maturity more weight, add a security criterion…
rubric.draftSavedDesc: The rubric is not published yet; responses cannot be evaluated until you publish it.
rubric.publishedToastDesc: You can now evaluate incoming responses.
rubric.weightsInvalidTitle: Weights do not add up to 100

evaluation.doneToastDesc: Evaluated {{count}} responses with the published rubric.

derived.publishRubric: Generate and publish the evaluation rubric

dialog.description: Custom tasks complement the ones the app detects automatically.
dialog.titlePlaceholder: E.g. Call the CTO on Friday

playbook.title: Playbook for AI generation
playbook.badgeEmpty: You don't have a playbook yet
playbook.consultancyPlaceholder: Name of the consultancy you represent
playbook.extraMessagesPlaceholder: E.g.: Always mention past collaboration with sector startups. Avoid commercial promises. Include our website.
playbook.extraQuestionnairePlaceholder: E.g.: Always include questions about ISO certifications. Avoid funding round questions.

publicQuestionnaire.intro: Answer briefly so the company can evaluate your fit for the project.
publicQuestionnaire.thanksDesc: You can close this page. The company will review the answers shortly.
publicQuestionnaire.invalidToken: This link is invalid or has expired.
publicQuestionnaire.specificSectionSubtitle: These questions are based on the prior evaluation of your company.
